checkYourDetails.description: Title of the page where the user can check the details to be added to the PREreview.

yourDetails.description: Heading for the section that contains the user’s details.

publishedName.description: Label for the published name the user has chosen.

changeName.description: Link that allows the user to change their published name.

nowPublish.description: Heading for the section to update the published PREreview after checking their answers.

weWillAddYourName.message: We will add your name to the author list.
weWillAddYourName.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Now publish your updated PREreview”.

updatePrereview.description: Button to complete the process and update the published PREreview.

nameAdded.description: Title of the page shown once the PREreview has been updated.

whatHappensNext.description: Heading for details of what happens next and when; the user has completed their task and has no further actions to take.

ableToSeePrereviewShortly.message: You’ll be able to see your name on the PREreview shortly.
ableToSeePrereviewShortly.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “What happens next”.

yourDoi.description: Label for the DOI of the PREreview that has been updated.

closeWindowOrSeePrereview.message: You can close this window, or <link>see the PREreview</link>.
closeWindowOrSeePrereview.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “What happens next”.

beListed.description: Title of the page where the user has been invited to be listed as an author on a PREreview and can start the process.

invitedToAppear.message: You’ve been invited to appear as an author on this PREreview.
invitedToAppear.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Be listed as an author”.

weWillAskYouToLogInWithYourOrcid.message: We will ask you to log in with your ORCID iD. If you don’t have an iD, you can create one.
weWillAskYouToLogInWithYourOrcid.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Before you start”.

whatIsAnOrcid.description: Heading for the explanation of what an ORCID iD is.

orcidExplainer.message: An <link>ORCID iD</link> is a unique identifier that distinguishes you from everyone with the same or similar name.
orcidExplainer.description: Text following the heading “What is an ORCID iD?” explaining what an ORCID iD is.

beforeYouStart.description: Heading for the section that contains information about what the user needs to know before starting the process.

declineTheInvitation.description: Title of the page where the user has been invited to be listed as an author but has followed the link to decline it.

youCanDecline.message: You can decline this invitation and remain an anonymous author.
youCanDecline.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Decline the invitation”.

asYouHaveAlreadyStartedWeWillTakeYouToTh.message: As you’ve already started, we’ll take you to the next step so you can carry on.
asYouHaveAlreadyStartedWeWillTakeYouToTh.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Be listed as an author” when the user has already started the process.

sorryHavingProblems.description: Title of the page shown when there is a technical problem.

unableToAddYourNameWorkHasBeenSaved.message: We were unable to add your name to the PREreview. We saved your work.
unableToAddYourNameWorkHasBeenSaved.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

comeBackLater.message: Please try again later by coming back to this page.
comeBackLater.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

getInTouch.message: If this problem persists, please <link>get in touch</link>.
getInTouch.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

invitationDeclined.description: Title of the page shown when the user has declined the invitation to be listed as an author.

youHaveDeclinedToAppearAsAuthor.message: You’ve declined to appear as an author on this PREreview.
youHaveDeclinedToAppearAsAuthor.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Invitation declined”.

youCanCloseThisWindow.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Invitation declined”.

contactDetails.description: Heading for the section that contains the user’s contact details.

readyToAddYourNameConfirmYourEmailFirst.message: We’re ready to add your name to the PREreview, but we need to confirm your email address first.
readyToAddYourNameConfirmYourEmailFirst.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Contact details”.

usedToContactYouAboutYourAccountAndPrere.message: We’ll only use this to contact you about your account and PREreviews.
usedToContactYouAboutYourAccountAndPrere.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Contact details” and explains the purpose of the contact email address.

whatEmailAddressShouldWeUse.message: What email address should we use?
whatEmailAddressShouldWeUse.description: Heading for the question about the email address the user would like to use.

selectTheEmailAddressYouWouldLikeToUse.message: Select the email address that you would like to use
selectTheEmailAddressYouWouldLikeToUse.description: Error message shown when the user submits the “What email address should we use?” form without selecting an email address.

aDifferentOne.description: Option for the “What email address should we use?” question that allows the user to enter a different email address.

whatIsYourEmailAddress.description: Label for the input field for the user’s email address.

enterYourEmailAddress.description: Error message shown when the user submits the “What email address should we use?” form, selects the “A different one” option, and doesn’t enter an email address.

enterAnEmailAddressInTheCorrectFormat.message: Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
enterAnEmailAddressInTheCorrectFormat.description: Error message shown when the user submits the “What email address should we use?” form, selects the “A different one” option, and enters an invalid an email address.

verifyYourEmailAddress.description: Heading for the page after the “What email address should we use?” form.

pleaseOpenLinkInEmailWeSentYou.message: Please open the email we sent to {contactEmailAddress} and follow the link. You’ll then be able to add your name to the PREreview.
pleaseOpenLinkInEmailWeSentYou.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Verify your email address” and explains what the user needs to do next.

onceVerifiedYouCanClosePage.message: Once your address is verified, you can close this page.
onceVerifiedYouCanClosePage.description: Text that appears alongside the heading “Verify your email address” and informs the user that they can close the page once their email address is verified.

whatNameWouldYouLikeToUse.message: What name would you like to use?
whatNameWouldYouLikeToUse.description: Label for the question about the name the user would like to use.

youCanChooseBetweenOrcidNameAndPrereview.message: You can choose between the name on your ORCID record or your PREreview pseudonym.
youCanChooseBetweenOrcidNameAndPrereview.description: Text the appears alongside the question “What name would you like to use?”.

whatIsAPrereviewPseudonym.description: Heading for the explanation of what a PREreview pseudonym is.

pseudonymExplainer.message: A <definition>PREreview pseudonym</definition> is an alternate name you can use instead of your real name. It is unique and combines a random color and animal. Your pseudonym is ‘{userPseudonym}.’
pseudonymExplainer.description: Text the appears alongside the question “What is a PREreview pseudonym?”.

whyUseAPseudonym.message: Using your pseudonym, you can contribute to open preprint review without fearing retribution or judgment that may occur when using your real name. However, using a pseudonym retains an element of accountability.
whyUseAPseudonym.description: Text the appears alongside the question “What is a PREreview pseudonym?”.

selectTheNameYouWouldLikeToUse.message: Select the name that you would like to use
selectTheNameYouWouldLikeToUse.description: Error message shown when the user submits the “What name would you like to use?” form without selecting a name.

weWillLinkYourPrereviewToYourOrcid.message: We’ll link your PREreview to your ORCID iD.
weWillLinkYourPrereviewToYourOrcid.description: Text that accompanies the public persona choice for the question “What name would you like to use?”.

weWillOnlyLinkToOtherPseudonymPrereviews.message: We’ll only link your PREreview to others that also use your pseudonym.
weWillOnlyLinkToOtherPseudonymPrereviews.description: Text that accompanies the pseudonym choice for the question “What name would you like to use?”.
